name: GitHub
description: Read repo activity, PR queue, and notifications via the GitHub REST API. Used by the content and brand domains to track open-source presence and contributor momentum.
connection: Personal access token from github.com/settings/tokens. The token reads the `user`, `repo`, and `notifications` scopes. Set GH_TOKEN in your shell or ~/.ai/env/.env. The connector hits api.github.com/user as a probe.
